tools.name: product_search
tools.description: Search products by name across Algolia, UPCItemDB, and Open Food Facts. Returns prices, brands, images.

tools.name: barcode_lookup
tools.description: Look up product by EAN/UPC barcode. Returns full product details, prices from multiple merchants.

tools.name: shopify_products
tools.description: Fetch products from any Shopify-powered store via their public /products.json endpoint.

tools.name: price_comparison
tools.description: Compare product prices across multiple sources. Provides merchant links for Idealo, Amazon, Google Shopping.

tools.name: category_trends
tools.description: Trending products and news in a specific category.

tools.name: marketplace_monitor
tools.description: Monitor marketplace presence and pricing news for your brand vs competitor.

tools.name: product_detail
tools.description: Extract structured product data (price, rating, images) from any product page URL using JSON-LD.
